mapper.select:
SELECT study_record.`record_id` AS recordId, study_record.`user_id` AS userId, study_record.`classroom_id` AS classroomId, study_record.`study_record` AS studyRecord, study_record.`join_datetime` AS joinDatetime,
course.`course_name` AS courseName, course.`id` AS courseId, course.`chapters` AS chapters,
classroom.`name` AS classroomName,
user.`name` AS teacherName
FROM study_record LEFT JOIN classroom ON study_record.`classroom_id` = classroom.`classroom_id` LEFT JOIN course ON classroom.`course_id` = course.`id` LEFT JOIN user ON classroom.`teacher_id` = user.`id` WHERE study_record.`user_id`= #{id} ;

SELECT course.works AS works, course.chapters AS chapters, course.id AS id, course.`course_name` AS courseName, course.`course_desc` AS courseDesc, course.`teacher_id` AS teacherId FROM course WHERE course.id=#{courseId};
